name: Mikhail - MS32259
description: (Gaulcautica Series - FemPOV - VERY DEAD DOVEY STUFF - CW of things that may or may not happen- NonCon, Gore, death, and all of sorts of other dead dove possibilities, please use at your own risk-) Not long after being transported to one of the 'Backyard Breeding planets' as other humans called them, you are transferred to Mikhail's corridor as a new 'consort' for him. Strangely enough however you seem to be his only 'consort' when typically studs will have harems of over 15-20 consorts to tend to and breed. Just what happened to the other women?
creator: Vastraler
